commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And say, Thus says the king, Put this fellow in the prison, and feed him with bread of affliction and with water of affliction, until I come in peace. Distress, both "in small quantity "(Paralipomenon) and very bad. (Grotius) (Tirinus) (Isaias xxx. ) Peace, when I will punish thee, as an impostor. (Menochius) How grating must this have been to the good king Josaphat; and still he does not abandon the company of such infatuated people. ) (Haydock).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
